3913 bool inlineSimpleClasses = Config_getBool(INLINE_SIMPLE_STRUCTS);

3915 {
3916 Definition *scope=0;
3917 if (inlineGroupedClasses && !partOfGroups().empty())
3918 {
3919 // point to the group that embeds this class
3920 return partOfGroups().front()->getOutputFileBase();
3921 }
3922 else if (inlineSimpleClasses && m_impl->isSimple && !partOfGroups().empty())
3923 {
3924 // point to simple struct inside a group
3925 return partOfGroups().front()->getOutputFileBase();
3926 }
3927 else if (inlineSimpleClasses && m_impl->isSimple && (scope=getOuterScope()))
3928 {
3929 if (scope==Doxygen::globalScope && getFileDef() && getFileDef()->isLinkableInProject()) // simple struct embedded in file
3930 {
3931 return getFileDef()->getOutputFileBase();
3932 }
3933 else if (scope->isLinkableInProject()) // simple struct embedded in other container (namespace/group/class)
3934 {
3935 return getOuterScope()->getOutputFileBase();
3936 }
3937 }
3938 }
3939 if (m_impl->templateMaster)
3940 {
3941 // point to the template of which this class is an instance
3942 return m_impl->templateMaster->getOutputFileBase();
3943 }
3944 return m_impl->fileName;
3945}

4008 {
4009 templateClass = toClassDefMutable((*it).classDef);
4010 }
4011 if (templateClass==0)
4012 {
4013 QCString tcname = removeRedundantWhiteSpace(localName()+templSpec);
4014 AUTO_TRACE("New template instance class name='{}' templSpec='{}' inside '{}' hidden={}",
4015 name(),templSpec,name(),isHidden());
4016
4017 ClassDef *foundCd = Doxygen::classLinkedMap->find(tcname);
4018 if (foundCd)
4019 {
4020 return foundCd;
4021 }
4022 templateClass =
4023 toClassDefMutable(
4024 Doxygen::classLinkedMap->add(tcname,
4025 std::unique_ptr<ClassDef>(
4026 new ClassDefImpl(fileName,startLine,startColumn,tcname,ClassDef::Class))));
4027 if (templateClass)
4028 {
4029 templateClass->setTemplateMaster(this);
4030 templateClass->setOuterScope(getOuterScope());
4031 templateClass->setHidden(isHidden());
4032 templateClass->setArtificial(isArtificial());
4033 m_impl->templateInstances.push_back(TemplateInstanceDef(templSpec,templateClass));
4034
4035 // also add nested classes
4036 for (const auto &innerCd : m_impl->innerClasses)
4037 {
4038 QCString innerName = tcname+"::"+innerCd->localName();
4039 ClassDefMutable *innerClass =
4040 toClassDefMutable(
4041 Doxygen::classLinkedMap->add(innerName,
4042 std::unique_ptr<ClassDef>(
4043 new ClassDefImpl(fileName,startLine,startColumn,innerName,ClassDef::Class))));
4044 if (innerClass)
4045 {
4046 templateClass->addInnerCompound(innerClass);
4047 innerClass->setOuterScope(templateClass);
4048 innerClass->setHidden(isHidden());
4049 innerClass->setArtificial(TRUE);
4050 }
4051 }
4052 freshInstance=TRUE;
4053 }
4054 }
4055 return templateClass;
4056}

void ClassDefImpl::internalInsertMember ( MemberDef *  md,

private

Definition at line 864 of file classdef.cpp.

868{
869 //printf("%s:insertInternalMember(%s) isHidden()=%d\n",qPrint(name()),qPrint(md->name()),md->isHidden());
870 if (md->isHidden()) return;
871
872 if (getLanguage()==SrcLangExt_VHDL)
873 {
874 QCString title=theTranslator->trVhdlType(md->getMemberSpecifiers(),FALSE);
875 m_impl->vhdlSummaryTitles.insert(title.str());
876 }
877
878 if (1 /*!isReference()*/) // changed to 1 for showing members of external
879 // classes when HAVE_DOT and UML_LOOK are enabled.
880 {
881 bool isSimple=FALSE;
882
883 /********************************************/
884 /* insert member in the declaration section */
885 /********************************************/
886 if (md->isRelated() && protectionLevelVisible(prot))
887 {
888 addMemberToList(MemberListType_related,md,TRUE);
889 }
890 else if (md->isFriend())
891 {
892 addMemberToList(MemberListType_friends,md,TRUE);
893 }
894 else
895 {
896 switch (md->memberType())
897 {
898 case MemberType_Service: // UNO IDL
899 addMemberToList(MemberListType_services,md,TRUE);
900 break;
901 case MemberType_Interface: // UNO IDL
902 addMemberToList(MemberListType_interfaces,md,TRUE);
903 break;
904 case MemberType_Signal: // Qt specific
905 addMemberToList(MemberListType_signals,md,TRUE);
906 break;
907 case MemberType_DCOP: // KDE2 specific
908 addMemberToList(MemberListType_dcopMethods,md,TRUE);
909 break;
910 case MemberType_Property:
911 addMemberToList(MemberListType_properties,md,TRUE);
912 break;
913 case MemberType_Event:
914 addMemberToList(MemberListType_events,md,TRUE);
915 break;
916 case MemberType_Slot: // Qt specific
917 switch (prot)
918 {
919 case Protection::Protected:
920 case Protection::Package: // slots in packages are not possible!
921 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proSlots,md,TRUE);
922 break;
923 case Protection::Public:
924 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubSlots,md,TRUE);
925 break;
926 case Protection::Private:
927 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priSlots,md,TRUE);
928 break;
929 }
930 break;
931 default: // any of the other members
932 if (md->isStatic())
933 {
934 if (md->isVariable())
935 {
936 switch (prot)
937 {
938 case Protection::Protected:
939 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proStaticAttribs,md,TRUE);
940 break;
941 case Protection::Package:
942 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacStaticAttribs,md,TRUE);
943 break;
944 case Protection::Public:
945 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubStaticAttribs,md,TRUE);
946 break;
947 case Protection::Private:
948 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priStaticAttribs,md,TRUE);
949 break;
950 }
951 }
952 else // function
953 {
954 switch (prot)
955 {
956 case Protection::Protected:
957 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proStaticMethods,md,TRUE);
958 break;
959 case Protection::Package:
960 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacStaticMethods,md,TRUE);
961 break;
962 case Protection::Public:
963 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubStaticMethods,md,TRUE);
964 break;
965 case Protection::Private:
966 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priStaticMethods,md,TRUE);
967 break;
968 }
969 }
970 }
971 else // not static
972 {
973 if (md->isVariable())
974 {
975 switch (prot)
976 {
977 case Protection::Protected:
978 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proAttribs,md,TRUE);
979 break;
980 case Protection::Package:
981 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacAttribs,md,TRUE);
982 break;
983 case Protection::Public:
984 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubAttribs,md,TRUE);
985 isSimple=!md->isFunctionPtr();
986 break;
987 case Protection::Private:
988 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priAttribs,md,TRUE);
989 break;
990 }
991 }
992 else if (md->isTypedef() || md->isEnumerate() || md->isEnumValue())
993 {
994 switch (prot)
995 {
996 case Protection::Protected:
997 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proTypes,md,TRUE);
998 break;
999 case Protection::Package:
1000 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacTypes,md,TRUE);
1001 break;
1002 case Protection::Public:
1003 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubTypes,md,TRUE);
1004 isSimple=!md->isEnumerate() &&
1005 !md->isEnumValue() &&
1006 QCString(md->typeString()).find(")(")==-1; // func ptr typedef
1007 break;
1008 case Protection::Private:
1009 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priTypes,md,TRUE);
1010 break;
1011 }
1012 }
1013 else // member function
1014 {
1015 switch (prot)
1016 {
1017 case Protection::Protected:
1018 addMemberToList(MemberListType_proMethods,md,TRUE);
1019 break;
1020 case Protection::Package:
1021 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pacMethods,md,TRUE);
1022 break;
1023 case Protection::Public:
1024 addMemberToList(MemberListType_pubMethods,md,TRUE);
1025 break;
1026 case Protection::Private:
1027 addMemberToList(MemberListType_priMethods,md,TRUE);
1028 break;
1029 }
1030 }
1031 }
1032 break;
1033 }
1034 }
1035 if (!isSimple) // not a simple field -> not a simple struct
1036 {
1037 m_impl->isSimple = FALSE;
1038 }
1039 //printf("adding %s simple=%d total_simple=%d\n",qPrint(name()),isSimple,m_impl->isSimple);
1040
1041 /*******************************************************/
1042 /* insert member in the detailed documentation section */
1043 /*******************************************************/
1044 if ((md->isRelated() && protectionLevelVisible(prot)) || md->isFriend())
1045 {
1046 addMemberToList(MemberListType_relatedMembers,md,FALSE);
1047 }
1048 else if (md->isFunction() &&
1049 md->protection()==Protection::Private &&
1050 (md->virtualness()!=Specifier::Normal || md->isOverride() || md->isFinal()) &&
1051 Config_getBool(EXTRACT_PRIV_VIRTUAL))
1052 {
1053 addMemberToList(MemberListType_functionMembers,md,FALSE);
1054 }
1055 else
1056 {
1057 switch (md->memberType())
1058 {
1059 case MemberType_Service: // UNO IDL
1060 addMemberToList(MemberListType_serviceMembers,md,FALSE);
1061 break;
1062 case MemberType_Interface: // UNO IDL
1063 addMemberToList(MemberListType_interfaceMembers,md,FALSE);
1064 break;
1065 case MemberType_Property:
1066 addMemberToList(MemberListType_propertyMembers,md,FALSE);
1067 break;
1068 case MemberType_Event:
1069 addMemberToList(MemberListType_eventMembers,md,FALSE);
1070 break;
1071 case MemberType_Signal: // fall through
1072 case MemberType_DCOP:
1073 addMemberToList(MemberListType_functionMembers,md,FALSE);
1074 break;
1075 case MemberType_Slot:
1076 if (protectionLevelVisible(prot))
1077 {
1078 addMemberToList(MemberListType_functionMembers,md,FALSE);
1079 }
1080 break;
1081 default: // any of the other members
1082 if (protectionLevelVisible(prot))
1083 {
1084 switch (md->memberType())
1085 {
1086 case MemberType_Typedef:
1087 addMemberToList(MemberListType_typedefMembers,md,FALSE);
1088 break;
1089 case MemberType_Enumeration:
1090 addMemberToList(MemberListType_enumMembers,md,FALSE);
1091 break;
1092 case MemberType_EnumValue:
1093 addMemberToList(MemberListType_enumValMembers,md,FALSE);
1094 break;
1095 case MemberType_Function:
1096 if (md->isConstructor() || md->isDestructor())
1097 {
1098 m_impl->memberLists.get(MemberListType_constructors,MemberListContainer::Class)->push_back(md);
1099 }
1100 else
1101 {
1102 addMemberToList(MemberListType_functionMembers,md,FALSE);
1103 }
1104 break;
1105 case MemberType_Variable:
1106 addMemberToList(MemberListType_variableMembers,md,FALSE);
1107 break;
1108 case MemberType_Define:
1109 warn(md->getDefFileName(),md->getDefLine()-1,"A define (%s) cannot be made a member of %s",
1110 qPrint(md->name()), qPrint(this->name()));
1111 break;
1112 default:
1113 err("Unexpected member type %d found!\n",md->memberType());
1114 }
1115 }
1116 break;
1117 }
1118 }
1119
1120 /*************************************************/
1121 /* insert member in the appropriate member group */
1122 /*************************************************/
1123 // Note: this must be done AFTER inserting the member in the
1124 // regular groups
1125 //addMemberToGroup(md,groupId);
1126
1127 }
1128
1129 if (md->virtualness()==Specifier::Pure)
1130 {
1131 m_impl->isAbstract=true;
1132 }
1133
1134 if (md->name()=="operator->")
1135 {
1136 m_impl->arrowOperator=md;
1137 }
1138
1139 if (addToAllList &&
1140 !(Config_getBool(HIDE_FRIEND_COMPOUNDS) &&
1141 md->isFriend() &&
1142 (QCString(md->typeString())=="friend class" ||
1143 QCString(md->typeString())=="friend struct" ||
1144 QCString(md->typeString())=="friend union")))
1145 {
1146 //printf("=======> adding member %s to class %s\n",qPrint(md->name()),qPrint(name()));
1147
1148 MemberNameInfo *mni = m_impl->allMemberNameInfoLinkedMap.add(md->name());
1149 mni->push_back(std::make_unique<MemberInfo>(md,prot,md->virtualness(),FALSE));
1150 }
1151}

int ClassDefImpl::isBaseClass ( const ClassDef *  bcd,
bool  followInstances,

virtual

Returns TRUE iff bcd is a direct or indirect base class of this class.

This function will recursively traverse all branches of the inheritance tree.

Implements ClassDef.

3397{
3398 int distance=0;
3399 //printf("isBaseClass(cd=%s) looking for %s templSpec=%s\n",qPrint(name()),qPrint(bcd->name()),qPrint(templSpec));
3400 for (const auto &bclass : baseClasses())
3401 {
3402 const ClassDef *ccd = bclass.classDef;
3403 if (!followInstances && ccd->templateMaster())
3404 {
3405 ccd=ccd->templateMaster();
3406 }
3407 if (ccd==bcd && (templSpec.isEmpty() || templSpec==bclass.templSpecifiers))
3408 {
3409 distance=1;
3410 break; // no shorter path possible
3411 }
3412 else
3413 {
3414 int d = ccd->isBaseClass(bcd,followInstances,templSpec);
3415 if (d>256)
3416 {
3417 err("Possible recursive class relation while inside %s and looking for base class %s\n",qPrint(name()),qPrint(bcd->name()));
3418 return 0;
3419 }
3420 else if (d>0) // path found
3421 {
3422 if (distance==0 || d+1<distance) // update if no path found yet or shorter path found
3423 {
3424 distance=d+1;
3425 }
3426 }
3427 }
3428 }
3429 return distance;
3430}

3702{
3703 ClassDefMutable *category = toClassDefMutable(cat);
3704 if (category)
3705 {
3706 bool extractLocalMethods = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_LOCAL_METHODS);
3707 bool makePrivate = category->isLocal();
3708 // in case extract local methods is not enabled we don't add the methods
3709 // of the category in case it is defined in the .m file.
3710 if (makePrivate && !extractLocalMethods) return;
3711 bool isExtension = category->isExtension();
3712
3713 category->setCategoryOf(this);
3714 if (isExtension)
3715 {
3716 category->setArtificial(TRUE);
3717
3718 // copy base classes/protocols from extension
3719 for (const auto &bcd : category->baseClasses())
3720 {
3721 insertBaseClass(bcd.classDef,bcd.usedName,bcd.prot,bcd.virt,bcd.templSpecifiers);
3722 // correct bcd.classDef so that they do no longer derive from
3723 // category, but from this class!
3724 BaseClassList scl = bcd.classDef->subClasses();
3725 for (auto &scd : scl)
3726 {
3727 if (scd.classDef==category)
3728 {
3729 scd.classDef=this;
3730 }
3731 }
3732 bcd.classDef->updateSubClasses(scl);
3733 }
3734 }
3735 // make methods private for categories defined in the .m file
3736 //printf("%s::mergeCategory makePrivate=%d\n",qPrint(name()),makePrivate);
3737
3738 const MemberNameInfoLinkedMap &srcMnd = category->memberNameInfoLinkedMap();
3739 MemberNameInfoLinkedMap &dstMnd = m_impl->allMemberNameInfoLinkedMap;
3740
3741 for (auto &srcMni : srcMnd)
3742 {
3743 MemberNameInfo *dstMni=dstMnd.find(srcMni->memberName());
3744 if (dstMni) // method is already defined in the class
3745 {
3746 //printf("Existing member %s\n",srcMni->memberName());
3747 auto &dstMi = dstMni->front();
3748 auto &srcMi = srcMni->front();
3749 if (srcMi && dstMi)
3750 {
3751 MemberDefMutable *smdm = toMemberDefMutable(srcMi->memberDef());
3752 MemberDefMutable *dmdm = toMemberDefMutable(dstMi->memberDef());
3753 if (smdm && dmdm)
3754 {
3755 combineDeclarationAndDefinition(smdm,dmdm);
3756 dmdm->setCategory(category);
3757 dmdm->setCategoryRelation(smdm);
3758 smdm->setCategoryRelation(dmdm);
3759 }
3760 }
3761 }
3762 else // new method name
3763 {
3764 //printf("New member %s\n",srcMni->memberName());
3765 // create a deep copy of the list
3766 MemberNameInfo *newMni = dstMnd.add(srcMni->memberName());
3767
3768 // copy the member(s) from the category to this class
3769 for (auto &mi : *srcMni)
3770 {
3771 //printf("Adding '%s'\n",qPrint(mi->memberDef->name()));
3772 Protection prot = mi->prot();
3773 //if (makePrivate) prot = Private;
3774 auto newMd = mi->memberDef()->deepCopy();
3775 if (newMd)
3776 {
3777 auto mmd = toMemberDefMutable(newMd.get());
3778 //printf("Copying member %s\n",qPrint(mi->memberDef->name()));
3779 mmd->moveTo(this);
3780
3781 auto newMi=std::make_unique<MemberInfo>(newMd.get(),prot,mi->virt(),mi->inherited());
3782 newMi->setScopePath(mi->scopePath());
3783 newMi->setAmbigClass(mi->ambigClass());
3784 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(mi->ambiguityResolutionScope());
3785 newMni->push_back(std::move(newMi));
3786
3787 // also add the newly created member to the global members list
3788
3789 QCString name = newMd->name();
3790 MemberName *mn = Doxygen::memberNameLinkedMap->add(name);
3791
3792 mmd->setCategory(category);
3793 mmd->setCategoryRelation(mi->memberDef());
3794
3795 mmd->setCategoryRelation(newMd.get());
3796 if (makePrivate || isExtension)
3797 {
3798 mmd->makeImplementationDetail();
3799 }
3800 internalInsertMember(newMd.get(),prot,FALSE);
3801 mn->push_back(std::move(newMd));
3802 }
3803 }
3804 }
3805 }
3806 }
3807}

◆ mergeMembers()

void ClassDefImpl::mergeMembers ( )
virtual

recursively merges the 'all members' lists of a class base with that of this class. Must only be called for classes without subclasses!

Implements ClassDefMutable.

3467 if (m_impl->membersMerged) return;
3468
3469 //bool optimizeOutputForJava = Config_getBool(OPTIMIZE_OUTPUT_JAVA);
3470 //bool vhdlOpt = Config_getBool(OPTIMIZE_OUTPUT_VHDL);
3471 SrcLangExt lang = getLanguage();
3472 QCString sep=getLanguageSpecificSeparator(lang,TRUE);
3473 uint32_t sepLen = sep.length();
3474
3475 m_impl->membersMerged=TRUE;
3476 //printf(" mergeMembers for %s\n",qPrint(name()));
3477 bool inlineInheritedMembers = Config_getBool(INLINE_INHERITED_MEMB);
3478 bool extractPrivate = Config_getBool(EXTRACT_PRIVATE);
3479 for (const auto &bcd : baseClasses())
3480 {
3481 ClassDefMutable *bClass=toClassDefMutable(bcd.classDef);
3482 if (bClass)
3483 {
3484 // merge the members in the base class of this inheritance branch first
3485 bClass->mergeMembers();
3486 if (bClass->getLanguage()==SrcLangExt_Python) continue; // python does not have member overloading, see issue 8480
3487
3488 const MemberNameInfoLinkedMap &srcMnd = bClass->memberNameInfoLinkedMap();
3489 MemberNameInfoLinkedMap &dstMnd = m_impl->allMemberNameInfoLinkedMap;
3490
3491 for (auto &srcMni : srcMnd)
3492 {
3493 //printf(" Base member name %s\n",srcMni->memberName());
3494 MemberNameInfo *dstMni;
3495 if ((dstMni=dstMnd.find(srcMni->memberName())))
3496 // a member with that name is already in the class.
3497 // the member may hide or reimplement the one in the sub class
3498 // or there may be another path to the base class that is already
3499 // visited via another branch in the class hierarchy.
3500 {
3501 for (auto &srcMi : *srcMni)
3502 {
3503 MemberDef *srcMd = srcMi->memberDef();
3504 bool found=FALSE;
3505 bool ambiguous=FALSE;
3506 bool hidden=FALSE;
3507 const ClassDef *srcCd = srcMd->getClassDef();
3508 for (auto &dstMi : *dstMni)
3509 {
3510 const MemberDef *dstMd = dstMi->memberDef();
3511 if (srcMd!=dstMd) // different members
3512 {
3513 const ClassDef *dstCd = dstMd->getClassDef();
3514 //printf(" Is %s a base class of %s?\n",qPrint(srcCd->name()),qPrint(dstCd->name()));
3515 if (srcCd==dstCd || dstCd->isBaseClass(srcCd,TRUE))
3516 // member is in the same or a base class
3517 {
3518 ArgumentList &srcAl = const_cast<ArgumentList&>(srcMd->argumentList());
3519 ArgumentList &dstAl = const_cast<ArgumentList&>(dstMd->argumentList());
3520 found=matchArguments2(
3521 srcMd->getOuterScope(),srcMd->getFileDef(),&srcAl,
3522 dstMd->getOuterScope(),dstMd->getFileDef(),&dstAl,
3523 TRUE,getLanguage()
3524 );
3525 //printf(" Yes, matching (%s<->%s): %d\n",
3526 // qPrint(argListToString(srcMd->argumentList())),
3527 // qPrint(argListToString(dstMd->argumentList())),
3528 // found);
3529 hidden = hidden || !found;
3530 }
3531 else // member is in a non base class => multiple inheritance
3532 // using the same base class.
3533 {
3534 //printf("$$ Existing member %s %s add scope %s\n",
3535 // qPrint(dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope),
3536 // qPrint(dstMd->name()),
3537 // qPrint(dstMi->scopePath.left(dstMi->scopePath.find("::")+2));
3538
3539 QCString scope=dstMi->scopePath().left(dstMi->scopePath().find(sep)+sepLen);
3540 if (scope!=dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope().left(scope.length()))
3541 {
3542 dstMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(scope+dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope());
3543 }
3544 ambiguous=TRUE;
3545 }
3546 }
3547 else // same members
3548 {
3549 // do not add if base class is virtual or
3550 // if scope paths are equal or
3551 // if base class is an interface (and thus implicitly virtual).
3552 //printf("same member found srcMi->virt=%d dstMi->virt=%d\n",srcMi->virt,dstMi->virt);
3553 if ((srcMi->virt()!=Specifier::Normal && dstMi->virt()!=Specifier::Normal) ||
3554 bClass->name()+sep+srcMi->scopePath() == dstMi->scopePath() ||
3555 dstMd->getClassDef()->compoundType()==Interface
3556 )
3557 {
3558 found=TRUE;
3559 }
3560 else // member can be reached via multiple paths in the
3561 // inheritance tree
3562 {
3563 //printf("$$ Existing member %s %s add scope %s\n",
3564 // qPrint(dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope),
3565 // qPrint(dstMd->name()),
3566 // qPrint(dstMi->scopePath.left(dstMi->scopePath.find("::")+2));
3567
3568 QCString scope=dstMi->scopePath().left(dstMi->scopePath().find(sep)+sepLen);
3569 if (scope!=dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope().left(scope.length()))
3570 {
3571 dstMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(dstMi->ambiguityResolutionScope()+scope);
3572 }
3573 ambiguous=TRUE;
3574 }
3575 }
3576 if (found) break;
3577 }
3578 //printf("member %s::%s hidden %d ambiguous %d srcMi->ambigClass=%p\n",
3579 // qPrint(srcCd->name()),qPrint(srcMd->name()),hidden,ambiguous,srcMi->ambigClass);
3580
3581 // TODO: fix the case where a member is hidden by inheritance
3582 // of a member with the same name but with another prototype,
3583 // while there is more than one path to the member in the
3584 // base class due to multiple inheritance. In this case
3585 // it seems that the member is not reachable by prefixing a
3586 // scope name either (according to my compiler). Currently,
3587 // this case is shown anyway.
3588 if (!found && srcMd->protection()!=Protection::Private && !srcMd->isFriend())
3589 {
3590 Protection prot = srcMd->protection();
3591 if (bcd.prot==Protection::Protected && prot==Protection::Public)
3592 {
3593 prot = bcd.prot;
3594 }
3595 else if (bcd.prot==Protection::Private)
3596 {
3597 prot = bcd.prot;
3598 }
3599
3600 if (inlineInheritedMembers)
3601 {
3602 if (!isStandardFunc(srcMd))
3603 {
3604 //printf(" insertMember '%s'\n",qPrint(srcMd->name()));
3605 internalInsertMember(srcMd,prot,FALSE);
3606 }
3607 }
3608
3609 Specifier virt=srcMi->virt();
3610 if (virt==Specifier::Normal && bcd.virt!=Specifier::Normal) virt=bcd.virt;
3611
3612 std::unique_ptr<MemberInfo> newMi = std::make_unique<MemberInfo>(srcMd,prot,virt,TRUE);
3613 newMi->setScopePath(bClass->name()+sep+srcMi->scopePath());
3614 if (ambiguous)
3615 {
3616 //printf("$$ New member %s %s add scope %s::\n",
3617 // qPrint(srcMi->ambiguityResolutionScope),
3618 // qPrint(srcMd->name()),
3619 // qPrint(bClass->name()));
3620
3621 QCString scope=bClass->name()+sep;
3622 if (scope!=srcMi->ambiguityResolutionScope().left(scope.length()))
3623 {
3624 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(scope+srcMi->ambiguityResolutionScope());
3625 }
3626 }
3627 if (hidden)
3628 {
3629 if (srcMi->ambigClass()==0)
3630 {
3631 newMi->setAmbigClass(bClass);
3632 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(bClass->name()+sep);
3633 }
3634 else
3635 {
3636 newMi->setAmbigClass(srcMi->ambigClass());
3637 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(srcMi->ambigClass()->name()+sep);
3638 }
3639 }
3640 dstMni->push_back(std::move(newMi));
3641 }
3642 }
3643 }
3644 else // base class has a member that is not in the sub class => copy
3645 {
3646 // create a deep copy of the list (only the MemberInfo's will be
3647 // copied, not the actual MemberDef's)
3648 MemberNameInfo *newMni = dstMnd.add(srcMni->memberName());
3649
3650 // copy the member(s) from the base to the sub class
3651 for (auto &mi : *srcMni)
3652 {
3653 if (!mi->memberDef()->isFriend()) // don't inherit friends
3654 {
3655 Protection prot = mi->prot();
3656 if (bcd.prot==Protection::Protected)
3657 {
3658 if (prot==Protection::Public) prot=Protection::Protected;
3659 }
3660 else if (bcd.prot==Protection::Private)
3661 {
3662 prot=Protection::Private;
3663 }
3664 //printf("%s::%s: prot=%d bcd.prot=%d result=%d\n",
3665 // qPrint(name()),qPrint(mi->memberDef->name()),mi->prot,
3666 // bcd.prot,prot);
3667
3668 if (prot!=Protection::Private || extractPrivate)
3669 {
3670 Specifier virt=mi->virt();
3671 if (virt==Specifier::Normal && bcd.virt!=Specifier::Normal) virt=bcd.virt;
3672
3673 if (inlineInheritedMembers)
3674 {
3675 if (!isStandardFunc(mi->memberDef()))
3676 {
3677 //printf(" insertMember '%s'\n",qPrint(mi->memberDef->name()));
3678 internalInsertMember(mi->memberDef(),prot,FALSE);
3679 }
3680 }
3681 //printf("Adding!\n");
3682 std::unique_ptr<MemberInfo> newMi = std::make_unique<MemberInfo>(mi->memberDef(),prot,virt,TRUE);
3683 newMi->setScopePath(bClass->name()+sep+mi->scopePath());
3684 newMi->setAmbigClass(mi->ambigClass());
3685 newMi->setAmbiguityResolutionScope(mi->ambiguityResolutionScope());
3686 newMni->push_back(std::move(newMi));
3687 }
3688 }
3689 }
3690 }
3691 }
3692 }
3693 }
3694 //printf(" end mergeMembers\n");
3695}

1531 ol.writeRuler();
1532 ol.pushGeneratorState();
1533 ol.disableAllBut(OutputType::Docbook);
1534 ol.startParagraph();
1535 ol.parseText(generatedFromFiles());
1536 ol.endParagraph();
1537 ol.popGeneratorState();
1538 ol.disable(OutputType::Docbook);
1539 ol.parseText(generatedFromFiles());
1540 ol.enable(OutputType::Docbook);
1541
1542 bool first=TRUE;
1543 for (const auto &fd : m_impl->files)
1544 {
1545 if (first)
1546 {
1547 first=FALSE;
1548 ol.startItemList();
1549 }
1550
1551 ol.startItemListItem();
1552 QCString path=fd->getPath();
1553 if (Config_getBool(FULL_PATH_NAMES))
1554 {
1555 ol.docify(stripFromPath(path));
1556 }
1557
1558 QCString fname = fd->name();
1559 if (!fd->getVersion().isEmpty()) // append version if available
1560 {
1561 fname += " (" + fd->getVersion() + ")";
1562 }
1563
1564 // for HTML
1565 ol.pushGeneratorState();
1566 ol.disableAllBut(OutputType::Html);
1567 if (fd->generateSourceFile())
1568 {
1569 ol.writeObjectLink(QCString(),fd->getSourceFileBase(),QCString(),fname);
1570 }
1571 else if (fd->isLinkable())
1572 {
1573 ol.writeObjectLink(fd->getReference(),fd->getOutputFileBase(),QCString(),fname);
1574 }
1575 else
1576 {
1577 ol.docify(fname);
1578 }
1579 ol.popGeneratorState();
1580
1581 // for other output formats
1582 ol.pushGeneratorState();
1583 ol.disable(OutputType::Html);
1584 if (fd->isLinkable())
1585 {
1586 ol.writeObjectLink(fd->getReference(),fd->getOutputFileBase(),QCString(),fname);
1587 }
1588 else
1589 {
1590 ol.docify(fname);
1591 }
1592 ol.popGeneratorState();
1593
1594 ol.endItemListItem();
1595 }
1596 if (!first) ol.endItemList();
1597
1598 ol.popGeneratorState();
1599}

2378{
2379 //bool fortranOpt = Config_getBool(OPTIMIZE_FOR_FORTRAN);

2381 bool sliceOpt = Config_getBool(OPTIMIZE_OUTPUT_SLICE);
2382 SrcLangExt lang = getLanguage();
2383 if (visibleInParentsDeclList())
2384 {
2385 if (!found) // first class
2386 {
2387 if (sliceOpt)
2388 {
2389 if (compoundType()==Interface)
2390 {
2391 ol.startMemberHeader("interfaces");
2392 }
2393 else if (compoundType()==Struct)
2394 {
2395 ol.startMemberHeader("structs");
2396 }
2397 else if (compoundType()==Exception)
2398 {
2399 ol.startMemberHeader("exceptions");
2400 }
2401 else // compoundType==Class
2402 {
2403 ol.startMemberHeader("nested-classes");
2404 }
2405 }
2406 else // non-Slice optimization: single header for class/struct/..
2407 {
2408 ol.startMemberHeader("nested-classes");
2409 }
2410 if (!header.isEmpty())
2411 {
2412 ol.parseText(header);
2413 }
2414 else if (lang==SrcLangExt_VHDL)
2415 {
2416 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trVhdlType(VhdlDocGen::ARCHITECTURE,FALSE));
2417 }
2418 else
2419 {
2420 ol.parseText(lang==SrcLangExt_Fortran ?
2421 theTranslator->trDataTypes() :
2422 theTranslator->trCompounds());
2423 }
2424 ol.endMemberHeader();
2425 ol.startMemberList();
2426 found=TRUE;
2427 }
2428 ol.startMemberDeclaration();
2429 ol.startMemberItem(anchor(),OutputGenerator::MemberItemType::Normal);
2430 QCString ctype = compoundTypeString();
2431 QCString cname = displayName(!localNames);
2432
2433 if (lang!=SrcLangExt_VHDL) // for VHDL we swap the name and the type
2434 {
2435 if (isSliceLocal())
2436 {
2437 ol.writeString("local ");
2438 }
2439 ol.writeString(ctype);
2440 ol.writeString(" ");
2441 ol.insertMemberAlign();
2442 }

2444 {
2445 ol.writeObjectLink(getReference(),
2446 getOutputFileBase(),
2447 anchor(),
2448 cname
2449 );
2450 }
2451 else
2452 {
2453 ol.startBold();
2454 ol.docify(cname);
2455 ol.endBold();
2456 }
2457 if (lang==SrcLangExt_VHDL) // now write the type
2458 {
2459 ol.writeString(" ");
2460 ol.insertMemberAlign();
2461 ol.writeString(VhdlDocGen::getProtectionName(VhdlDocGen::convert(protection())));
2462 }
2463 ol.endMemberItem(OutputGenerator::MemberItemType::Normal);
2464
2465 // add the brief description if available
2466 if (!briefDescription().isEmpty() && Config_getBool(BRIEF_MEMBER_DESC))
2467 {
2468 auto parser { createDocParser() };
2469 auto ast { validatingParseDoc(*parser.get(),
2470 briefFile(),briefLine(),this,0,
2471 briefDescription(),FALSE,FALSE,
2472 QCString(),TRUE,FALSE,Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT)) };
2473 if (!ast->isEmpty())
2474 {
2475 ol.startMemberDescription(anchor());
2476 ol.writeDoc(ast.get(),this,0);
2477 if (isLinkableInProject())
2478 {
2479 writeMoreLink(ol,anchor());
2480 }
2481 ol.endMemberDescription();
2482 }
2483 }
2484 ol.endMemberDeclaration(anchor(),QCString());
2485 }
2486}

2723 {

2763 endFileWithNavPath(ol,this);
2764

2768 }

void ClassDefImpl::writeDocumentationContents ( OutputList &  ol,
const QCString &  pageTitle 
) const
private

Definition at line 2521 of file classdef.cpp.

2522{
2523 ol.startContents();
2524
2525 QCString pageType = " ";
2526 pageType += compoundTypeString();
2527
2528 bool exampleFlag=hasExamples();
2529
2530 //---------------------------------------- start flexible part -------------------------------
2531
2532 SrcLangExt lang = getLanguage();
2533
2534 for (const auto &lde : LayoutDocManager::instance().docEntries(LayoutDocManager::Class))
2535 {
2536 switch (lde->kind())
2537 {
2538 case LayoutDocEntry::BriefDesc:
2539 writeBriefDescription(ol,exampleFlag);
2540 break;
2541 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassIncludes:
2542 if (lang==SrcLangExt_Slice)
2543 {
2544 writeIncludeFilesForSlice(ol);
2545 }
2546 else
2547 {
2548 writeIncludeFiles(ol);
2549 }
2550 break;
2551 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassInheritanceGraph:
2552 writeInheritanceGraph(ol);
2553 break;
2554 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassCollaborationGraph:
2555 writeCollaborationGraph(ol);
2556 break;
2557 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassAllMembersLink:
2558 //writeAllMembersLink(ol); // this is now part of the summary links
2559 break;
2560 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDeclStart:
2561 startMemberDeclarations(ol);
2562 break;
2563 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberGroups:
2564 writeMemberGroups(ol);
2565 break;
2566 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDecl:
2567 {
2568 ClassDefSet visitedClasses;
2569 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl*>(lde.get());
2570 if (lmd)
2571 {
2572 writeMemberDeclarations(ol,visitedClasses,lmd->type,lmd->title(lang),lmd->subtitle(lang));
2573 }
2574 }
2575 break;
2576 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassNestedClasses:
2577 {
2578 const LayoutDocEntrySection *ls = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntrySection*>(lde.get());
2579 if (ls)
2580 {
2581 writeNestedClasses(ol,ls->title(lang));
2582 }
2583 }
2584 break;
2585 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDeclEnd:
2586 endMemberDeclarations(ol);
2587 break;
2588 case LayoutDocEntry::DetailedDesc:
2589 {
2590 const LayoutDocEntrySection *ls = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntrySection*>(lde.get());
2591 if (ls)
2592 {
2593 writeDetailedDescription(ol,pageType,exampleFlag,ls->title(lang));
2594 }
2595 }
2596 break;
2597 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDefStart:
2598 startMemberDocumentation(ol);
2599 break;
2600 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassInlineClasses:
2601 writeInlineClasses(ol);
2602 break;
2603 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDef:
2604 {
2605 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDef *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDef*>(lde.get());
2606 if (lmd)
2607 {
2608 writeMemberDocumentation(ol,lmd->type,lmd->title(lang));
2609 }
2610 }
2611 break;
2612 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDefEnd:
2613 endMemberDocumentation(ol);
2614 break;
2615 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassUsedFiles:
2616 showUsedFiles(ol);
2617 break;
2618 case LayoutDocEntry::AuthorSection:
2619 writeAuthorSection(ol);
2620 break;
2621 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceNestedNamespaces:
2622 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceNestedConstantGroups:
2623 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceClasses:
2624 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceConcepts:
2625 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceInterfaces:
2626 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceStructs:
2627 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceExceptions:
2628 case LayoutDocEntry::NamespaceInlineClasses:
2629 case LayoutDocEntry::ConceptDefinition:
2630 case LayoutDocEntry::FileClasses:
2631 case LayoutDocEntry::FileConcepts:
2632 case LayoutDocEntry::FileInterfaces:
2633 case LayoutDocEntry::FileStructs:
2634 case LayoutDocEntry::FileExceptions:
2635 case LayoutDocEntry::FileNamespaces:
2636 case LayoutDocEntry::FileConstantGroups:
2637 case LayoutDocEntry::FileIncludes:
2638 case LayoutDocEntry::FileIncludeGraph:
2639 case LayoutDocEntry::FileIncludedByGraph:
2640 case LayoutDocEntry::FileSourceLink:
2641 case LayoutDocEntry::FileInlineClasses:
2642 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupClasses:
2643 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupConcepts:
2644 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupInlineClasses:
2645 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupNamespaces:
2646 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupDirs:
2647 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupNestedGroups:
2648 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupFiles:
2649 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupGraph:
2650 case LayoutDocEntry::GroupPageDocs:
2651 case LayoutDocEntry::DirSubDirs:
2652 case LayoutDocEntry::DirFiles:
2653 case LayoutDocEntry::DirGraph:
2654 err("Internal inconsistency: member %d should not be part of "
2655 "LayoutDocManager::Class entry list\n",lde->kind());
2656 break;
2657 }
2658 }
2659
2660 ol.endContents();
2661}

2837{
2838 // write inner classes after the parent, so the tag files contain

1770 QCString nm;

1773 {
1774 QCString abs = m_impl->incInfo->fileDef->absFilePath();
1775 QCString potential;
1776 unsigned int length = 0;
1777 for (const auto &s : paths)
1778 {
1779 FileInfo info(s);
1780 if (info.exists())
1781 {
1782 QCString prefix = info.absFilePath();
1783 if (prefix.at(prefix.length() - 1) != '/')
1784 {
1785 prefix += '/';
1786 }
1787
1788 if (prefix.length() > length &&
1789 qstricmp(abs.left(prefix.length()).data(), prefix.data()) == 0) // case insensitive compare
1790 {
1791 length = prefix.length();
1792 potential = abs.right(abs.length() - prefix.length());
1793 }
1794 }
1795 }
1796
1797 if (length > 0)
1798 {
1799 nm = potential;
1800 }
1801 }
1802
1803 if (nm.isEmpty())
1804 {
1805 nm = m_impl->incInfo->includeName;
1806 }
1807
1808 ol.startParagraph();
1809 ol.docify(theTranslator->trDefinedIn()+" ");
1810 ol.startTypewriter();
1811 ol.docify("<");

1813 {

1816 else
1817 {
1818 ol.docify(nm);
1819 }
1820 ol.docify(">");
1821 ol.endTypewriter();
1822 ol.endParagraph();
1823 }
1824
1825 // Write a summary of the Slice definition including metadata.
1826 ol.startParagraph();
1827 ol.startTypewriter();
1828 if (!m_impl->metaData.isEmpty())
1829 {
1830 ol.docify(m_impl->metaData);
1831 ol.lineBreak();
1832 }
1833 if (m_impl->spec & Entry::Local)
1834 {
1835 ol.docify("local ");
1836 }
1837 if (m_impl->spec & Entry::Interface)
1838 {
1839 ol.docify("interface ");
1840 }
1841 else if (m_impl->spec & Entry::Struct)
1842 {
1843 ol.docify("struct ");
1844 }
1845 else if (m_impl->spec & Entry::Exception)
1846 {
1847 ol.docify("exception ");
1848 }
1849 else
1850 {
1851 ol.docify("class ");
1852 }
1853 ol.docify(stripScope(name()));
1854 if (!m_impl->inherits.empty())
1855 {
1856 if (m_impl->spec & (Entry::Interface|Entry::Exception))
1857 {
1858 ol.docify(" extends ");
1859 bool first=true;
1860 for (const auto &ibcd : m_impl->inherits)
1861 {
1862 if (!first) ol.docify(", ");
1863 ClassDef *icd = ibcd.classDef;
1864 ol.docify(icd->name());
1865 first=false;
1866 }
1867 }
1868 else
1869 {
1870 // Must be a class.
1871 bool implements = false;
1872 for (const auto &ibcd : m_impl->inherits)
1873 {
1874 ClassDef *icd = ibcd.classDef;
1875 if (icd->isInterface())
1876 {
1877 implements = true;
1878 }
1879 else
1880 {
1881 ol.docify(" extends ");
1882 ol.docify(icd->name());
1883 }
1884 }
1885 if (implements)
1886 {
1887 ol.docify(" implements ");
1888 bool first = true;
1889 for (const auto &ibcd : m_impl->inherits)
1890 {
1891 ClassDef *icd = ibcd.classDef;
1892 if (icd->isInterface())
1893 {
1894 if (!first) ol.docify(", ");
1895 first = false;
1896 ol.docify(icd->name());
1897 }
1898 }
1899 }
1900 }
1901 }
1902 ol.docify(" { ... }");
1903 ol.endTypewriter();
1904 ol.endParagraph();

1618{
1619 bool haveDot = Config_getBool(HAVE_DOT);
1620 auto classGraph = Config_getEnum(CLASS_GRAPH);
1621
1622 if (classGraph == CLASS_GRAPH_t::NO) return;
1623 // count direct inheritance relations
1624 const int count=countInheritanceNodes();
1625
1626 bool renderDiagram = FALSE;
1627 if (haveDot && (classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::YES || classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::GRAPH))
1628 // write class diagram using dot
1629 {
1630 DotClassGraph inheritanceGraph(this,Inheritance);
1631 if (inheritanceGraph.isTooBig())
1632 {
1633 warn_uncond("Inheritance graph for '%s' not generated, too many nodes (%d), threshold is %d. Consider increasing DOT_GRAPH_MAX_NODES.\n",
1634 qPrint(name()), inheritanceGraph.numNodes(), Config_getInt(DOT_GRAPH_MAX_NODES));
1635 }
1636 else if (!inheritanceGraph.isTrivial())
1637 {
1638 ol.pushGeneratorState();
1639 ol.disable(OutputType::Man);
1640 ol.startDotGraph();
1641 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trClassDiagram(displayName()));
1642 ol.endDotGraph(inheritanceGraph);
1643 ol.popGeneratorState();
1644 renderDiagram = TRUE;
1645 }
1646 }
1647 else if ((classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::YES || classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::GRAPH || classGraph==CLASS_GRAPH_t::BUILTIN) && count>0)
1648 // write class diagram using built-in generator
1649 {
1650 ClassDiagram diagram(this); // create a diagram of this class.
1651 ol.startClassDiagram();
1652 ol.disable(OutputType::Man);
1653 ol.parseText(theTranslator->trClassDiagram(displayName()));
1654 ol.enable(OutputType::Man);
1655 ol.endClassDiagram(diagram,getOutputFileBase(),displayName());
1656 renderDiagram = TRUE;
1657 }
1658
1659 if (renderDiagram) // if we already show the inheritance relations graphically,
1660 // then hide the text version
1661 {
1662 ol.disableAllBut(OutputType::Man);
1663 }
1664
1665 if (!m_impl->inherits.empty())
1666 {
1667 auto replaceFunc = [this,&ol](size_t entryIndex)
1668 {
1669 BaseClassDef &bcd=m_impl->inherits[entryIndex];
1670 ClassDef *cd=bcd.classDef;
1671
1672 // use the class name but with the template arguments as given
1673 // in the inheritance relation
1674 QCString displayName = insertTemplateSpecifierInScope(
1675 cd->displayName(),bcd.templSpecifiers);
1676
1677 if (cd->isLinkable())
1678 {
1679 ol.writeObjectLink(cd->getReference(),
1680 cd->getOutputFileBase(),
1681 cd->anchor(),
1682 displayName);
1683 }
1684 else
1685 {
1686 ol.docify(displayName);
1687 }
1688 };
1689
1690 ol.startParagraph();
1691 writeMarkerList(ol,
1692 theTranslator->trInheritsList(static_cast<int>(m_impl->inherits.size())).str(),
1693 m_impl->inherits.size(),
1694 replaceFunc);
1695 ol.endParagraph();
1696 }
1697
1698 // write subclasses
1699 if (!m_impl->inheritedBy.empty())
1700 {
1701
1702 auto replaceFunc = [this,&ol](size_t entryIndex)
1703 {
1704 BaseClassDef &bcd=m_impl->inheritedBy[entryIndex];
1705 ClassDef *cd=bcd.classDef;
1706 if (cd->isLinkable())
1707 {
1708 ol.writeObjectLink(cd->getReference(),cd->getOutputFileBase(),cd->anchor(),cd->displayName());
1709 }
1710 else
1711 {
1712 ol.docify(cd->displayName());
1713 }
1714 writeInheritanceSpecifier(ol,bcd);
1715 };
1716
1717 ol.startParagraph();
1718 writeMarkerList(ol,
1719 theTranslator->trInheritedByList(static_cast<int>(m_impl->inheritedBy.size())).str(),
1720 m_impl->inheritedBy.size(),
1721 replaceFunc);
1722 ol.endParagraph();
1723 }
1724
1725 if (renderDiagram)
1726 {
1727 ol.enableAll();
1728 }
1729}

2202 bool isSimple = m_impl->isSimple;

2206
2207 // part 1: anchor and title
2208 QCString s = compoundTypeString()+" "+name();
2209
2210 // part 1a
2211 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2212 ol.disableAllBut(OutputType::Html);
2213 { // only HTML only
2214 ol.writeAnchor(QCString(),anchor());
2215 ol.startMemberDoc(QCString(),QCString(),anchor(),name(),1,1,FALSE);
2216 ol.startMemberDocName(FALSE);
2217 ol.parseText(s);
2218 ol.endMemberDocName();
2219 ol.endMemberDoc(FALSE);
2220 ol.writeString("</div>");
2221 ol.startIndent();
2222 }
2223 ol.popGeneratorState();
2224
2225 // part 1b
2226 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2227 ol.disable(OutputType::Html);
2228 ol.disable(OutputType::Man);
2229 { // for LaTeX/RTF only
2230 ol.writeAnchor(getOutputFileBase(),anchor());
2231 }
2232 ol.popGeneratorState();
2233
2234 // part 1c
2235 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2236 ol.disable(OutputType::Html);
2237 {
2238 // for LaTeX/RTF/Man
2239 ol.startGroupHeader(1);
2240 ol.parseText(s);
2241 ol.endGroupHeader(1);
2242 }
2243 ol.popGeneratorState();
2244
2245 SrcLangExt lang=getLanguage();
2246
2247 // part 2: the header and detailed description
2248 for (const auto &lde : LayoutDocManager::instance().docEntries(LayoutDocManager::Class))
2249 {
2250 switch (lde->kind())
2251 {
2252 case LayoutDocEntry::BriefDesc:
2253 {
2254 // since we already shown the brief description in the
2255 // declaration part of the container, so we use this to
2256 // show the details on top.
2257 writeDetailedDocumentationBody(ol);
2258 }
2259 break;
2260 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassInheritanceGraph:
2261 writeInheritanceGraph(ol);
2262 break;
2263 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassCollaborationGraph:
2264 writeCollaborationGraph(ol);
2265 break;
2266 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDeclStart:
2267 if (!isSimple) startMemberDeclarations(ol);
2268 break;
2269 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDecl:
2270 {
2271 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl*>(lde.get());
2272 if (lmd)
2273 {
2274 ClassDefSet visitedClasses;
2275 if (!isSimple) writeMemberDeclarations(ol,visitedClasses,lmd->type,lmd->title(lang),lmd->subtitle(lang),TRUE);
2276 }
2277 }
2278 break;
2279 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberGroups:
2280 if (!isSimple) writeMemberGroups(ol,TRUE);
2281 break;
2282 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDeclEnd:
2283 if (!isSimple) endMemberDeclarations(ol);
2284 break;
2285 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDefStart:
2286 if (!isSimple) startMemberDocumentation(ol);
2287 break;
2288 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDef:
2289 {
2290 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDef *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDef*>(lde.get());
2291 if (lmd)
2292 {
2293 if (isSimple)
2294 {
2295 writeSimpleMemberDocumentation(ol,lmd->type);
2296 }
2297 else
2298 {
2299 writeMemberDocumentation(ol,lmd->type,lmd->title(lang),TRUE);
2300 }
2301 }
2302 }
2303 break;
2304 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDefEnd:
2305 if (!isSimple) endMemberDocumentation(ol);
2306 break;
2307 default:
2308 break;
2309 }
2310 }
2311
2312 // part 3: close the block
2313 ol.pushGeneratorState();
2314 ol.disableAllBut(OutputType::Html);
2315 { // HTML only
2316 ol.endIndent();
2317 }
2318 ol.popGeneratorState();
2319}

3062 SrcLangExt lang = md->getLanguage();

3064 (prot!=Protection::Public || (virt!=Specifier::Normal && getLanguage()!=SrcLangExt_ObjC) ||
3065 md->isFriend() || md->isRelated() || md->isExplicit() ||

3072 && memberWritten)
3073 {
3074 StringVector sl;

3076 {
3077 sl.push_back(theTranslator->trVhdlType(md->getMemberSpecifiers(),TRUE).str()); //append vhdl type
3078 }
3079 else if (md->isFriend()) sl.push_back("friend");
3080 else if (md->isRelated()) sl.push_back("related");
3081 else
3082 {
3083 if (Config_getBool(INLINE_INFO) && md->isInline())
3084 sl.push_back("inline");
3085 if (md->isExplicit()) sl.push_back("explicit");
3086 if (md->isMutable()) sl.push_back("mutable");
3087 if (prot==Protection::Protected) sl.push_back("protected");
3088 else if (prot==Protection::Private) sl.push_back("private");
3089 else if (prot==Protection::Package) sl.push_back("package");
3090 if (virt==Specifier::Virtual && getLanguage()!=SrcLangExt_ObjC)
3091 sl.push_back("virtual");
3092 else if (virt==Specifier::Pure) sl.push_back("pure virtual");
3093 if (md->isStatic()) sl.push_back("static");
3094 if (md->isSignal()) sl.push_back("signal");
3095 if (md->isSlot()) sl.push_back("slot");
3096// this is the extra member page
3097 if (md->isOptional()) sl.push_back("optional");
3098 if (md->isAttribute()) sl.push_back("attribute");
3099 if (md->isUNOProperty()) sl.push_back("property");
3100 if (md->isReadonly()) sl.push_back("readonly");
3101 if (md->isBound()) sl.push_back("bound");
3102 if (md->isRemovable()) sl.push_back("removable");
3103 if (md->isConstrained()) sl.push_back("constrained");
3104 if (md->isTransient()) sl.push_back("transient");
3105 if (md->isMaybeVoid()) sl.push_back("maybevoid");
3106 if (md->isMaybeDefault()) sl.push_back("maybedefault");
3107 if (md->isMaybeAmbiguous()) sl.push_back("maybeambiguous");
3108 }
3109 bool firstSpan=true;
3110 for (const auto &s : sl)
3111 {
3112 if (!firstSpan)
3113 {
3114 ol.writeString("</span><span class=\"mlabel\">");
3115 }
3116 else
3117 {
3118 ol.writeString("<span class=\"mlabel\">");
3119 firstSpan=false;
3120 }
3121 ol.docify(s.c_str());
3122 }
3123 if (!firstSpan) ol.writeString("</span>");
3124 }
3125 if (memberWritten)
3126 {
3127 ol.writeString("</td>");
3128 ol.writeString("</tr>\n");
3129 }
3130 }
3131 }
3132 }
3133 //ol.endItemList();
3134
3135 if (!first) ol.writeString("</table>");
3136
3137 endFile(ol);
3138 ol.popGeneratorState();

2046 m_impl->innerClasses.declVisible()
2047 )

2049 const LayoutDocEntrySection *ls = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntrySection*>(lde.get());

2051 {
2052 ol.writeSummaryLink(QCString(),"nested-classes",ls->title(lang),first);
2053 first=FALSE;
2054 }
2055 }
2056 else if (lde->kind()==LayoutDocEntry::ClassAllMembersLink &&
2057 !m_impl->allMemberNameInfoLinkedMap.empty() &&
2058 !Config_getBool(OPTIMIZE_OUTPUT_FOR_C)
2059 )
2060 {
2061 ol.writeSummaryLink(getMemberListFileName(),"all-members-list",theTranslator->trListOfAllMembers(),first);

2063 }
2064 else if (lde->kind()==LayoutDocEntry::MemberDecl)
2065 {

2068 {
2069 MemberList * ml = getMemberList(lmd->type);

2073 first=FALSE;
2074 }
2075 }
2076 }
2077 }
2078 }
2079 else // VDHL only
2080 {

2082 {

2084 first=FALSE;
2085 }
2086 }
2087 if (!first)
2088 {

2090 }

2101 tagFile << compoundTypeString();
2102 tagFile << "\"";

2110 {

2112 }
2113 QCString idStr = id();
2114 if (!idStr.isEmpty())
2115 {
2116 tagFile << " <clangid>" << convertToXML(idStr) << "</clangid>\n";
2117 }

2119 {
2120 tagFile << " <templarg>" << convertToXML(a.type);

2124 }
2125 tagFile << "</templarg>\n";
2126 }

2128 {
2129 ClassDef *cd=ibcd.classDef;
2130 if (cd && cd->isLinkable())
2131 {
2132 if (!Config_getString(GENERATE_TAGFILE).isEmpty())
2133 {
2134 tagFile << " <base";
2135 if (ibcd.prot==Protection::Protected)
2136 {
2137 tagFile << " protection=\"protected\"";
2138 }
2139 else if (ibcd.prot==Protection::Private)
2140 {
2141 tagFile << " protection=\"private\"";
2142 }
2143 if (ibcd.virt==Specifier::Virtual)
2144 {
2145 tagFile << " virtualness=\"virtual\"";
2146 }
2147 tagFile << ">" << convertToXML(cd->name()) << "</base>\n";
2148 }
2149 }
2150 }
2151 for (const auto &lde : LayoutDocManager::instance().docEntries(LayoutDocManager::Class))
2152 {
2153 switch (lde->kind())
2154 {
2155 case LayoutDocEntry::ClassNestedClasses:
2156 {
2157 for (const auto &innerCd : m_impl->innerClasses)
2158 {
2159 if (innerCd->isLinkableInProject() && innerCd->templateMaster()==0 &&
2160 protectionLevelVisible(innerCd->protection()) &&
2161 !innerCd->isEmbeddedInOuterScope()
2162 )
2163 {
2164 tagFile << " <class kind=\"" << innerCd->compoundTypeString() <<
2165 "\">" << convertToXML(innerCd->name()) << "</class>\n";
2166 }
2167 }
2168 }
2169 break;
2170 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberDecl:
2171 {
2172 const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl *lmd = dynamic_cast<const LayoutDocEntryMemberDecl*>(lde.get());
2173 if (lmd)
2174 {
2175 MemberList * ml = getMemberList(lmd->type);
2176 if (ml)
2177 {
2178 ml->writeTagFile(tagFile);
2179 }
2180 }
2181 }
2182 break;
2183 case LayoutDocEntry::MemberGroups:
2184 {
2185 for (const auto &mg : m_impl->memberGroups)
2186 {
2187 mg->writeTagFile(tagFile);
2188 }
2189 }
2190 break;
2191 default:
2192 break;
2193 }
2194 }
2195 writeDocAnchorsToTagFile(tagFile);
2196 tagFile << " </compound>\n";

1330 {

1352 ol.docify(">");

1363 FALSE // autoBreak
